# Fra-Ber Super Dry Super-Absorbent Leather Chamois Cloth for Cars

notifications_active
Notify me



### THE BENEFITS OF SUPER DRY

Super Dry by Fra-Ber is a leather chamois cloth for cars and all vehicles ideal for dry cleaning.

Main features:

- 
**Dimensions:** 54x44 cm;

- 
**Material:** PVA chamois;

- 
**Multi-purpose:** a versatile solution for cleaning surfaces on cars, boats, motorbikes and in the home;

- 
**Soft and flexible:** the cloth is extremely soft and flexible, making it easy to clean delicate surfaces like mirrors or stainless steel;

- 
**Quick rinsing:** the PVA coating traps less residue than traditional cloths, making it quick and easy to use;

- 
**Extra-absorbent:** it not only effectively absorbs but also evenly releases water, simplifying the application of cleaners.

### HOW TO CLEAN THE SUPER DRY CLOTH

- We recommend washing the cloth before first use to prevent the colour from staining;

- Wash with warm or hot water using TEX. Machine washing at maximum 30° C;

- Do not mix with other types of fabric;

- Do not use fabric softeners as these tend to alter the properties of the microfibre;

- Do not use bleach as this tends to alter the properties of the microfibre;

- Do not tumble dry;

- Do not iron the towel.

### SAFETY INFO & DATA SHEET

**PRODUCT CODE**

70919 - SUPER DRY

## Why Choose FRA-BER

![image](//shop.fra-ber.it/cdn/shop/files/Piu_acquisti_piu_risparmi_x50.svg?v=1698322795)

##### MORE YOU BUY MORE YOU SAVE!
Our products are concentrated for greater effectiveness and are also sold in savings size, with discounts available for multiple quantity purchases, you can save time and money!

![image](//shop.fra-ber.it/cdn/shop/files/Spedizioni_x50.svg?v=1698322828)

##### SHIPMENTS ALL OVER ITALY AND EUROPE
We ship our products all over Italy, including islands, and to all countries in Europe, to receive them directly and comfortably to your home or business address!

![image](//shop.fra-ber.it/cdn/shop/files/Spedizione_gratuita_x50.svg?v=1698322847)

##### FREE EU SHIPPING ON ORDERS OVER 110 € WITH A FREE GIFT INCLUDED
Shipping to Italy is free for all orders over €65 and includes one of our specially selected gifts!

![image](//shop.fra-ber.it/cdn/shop/files/Pagamenti_sicuri_x50.svg?v=1698322860)

##### SAFE PAYMENTS
Pay safely online using all major payment methods such as credit card, bank transfer or in 3 interest-free installments with Paypal.
